differential_diagnoses: Autoimmune hemolytic anemia (AIHA) with potential underlying lymphoproliferative disorder
next_steps: Perform flow cytometry for PNH (CD55 and CD59 expression on RBCs and neutrophils/monocytes)
Obtain bone marrow aspirate and biopsy with cytogenetics and flow cytometry
Check serum vitamin B12, folate, homocysteine, and methylmalonic acid levels
Evaluate iron studies, haptoglobin, and reticulocyte count
Order serum ferritin, triglyceride, and soluble CD25 levels to evaluate for HLH
Perform peripheral blood smear review by a hematopathologist
Consider viral serologies including EBV, CMV, and parvovirus B19
